typography.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tighter text-slate-900 leading-tight

components.card: bg-white border border-slate-200/60 shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
components.button_primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-[#0A805D] px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-[#065F45] transition-colors shadow-sm
components.button_secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-white border border-slate-200 px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors shadow-sm
components.glass_header: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50 backdrop-saturate-150
components.badge_critical: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-rose-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-600 border border-rose-200
components.badge_warning: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-amber-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-amber-600 border border-amber-200
components.badge_info: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-blue-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-blue-600 border border-blue-200
components.ai_insight_card: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#F0FDF4] to-white border border-[#0A805D]/20 shadow-sm rounded-2xl p-6

image_urls.description: Hand holding invoice document with pen
Minimalist branding and marketing paper graphic

layout_rules.general: Never center content by default unless in a specific hero layout. Use asymmetrical grids. Emphasize optical alignment.
layout_rules.dashboard: Use a tight Bento grid (`gap-6`) for the main analytics. Widgets must span logically (e.g., Main Chart is `col-span-2`, Summary Stats are `col-span-1`). Use `h-full` to align bottoms.
layout_rules.forms: Use Shadcn customized components. Inputs should have minimal borders, subtle focus rings (`focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0A805D]/20`), and sufficient padding (`p-3`). Do NOT use standard HTML inputs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load and implement specific fonts: `Outfit` (for all headings) and `Manrope` (for body text). Do NOT use Inter.

ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs, table actions) MUST include a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`). This is a CRITICAL REQUIREMENT.
Build the Landing Page at the root route `/` and the main application Dashboard at `/dashboard`.
Install and use `@phosphor-icons/react` for icons. They provide the premium, fine-line duotone look expected of modern SaaS platforms.

Avoid generic admin dashboard templates. The dashboard must look like a high-end financial tool (Stripe, Ramp, Linear). Use stark whites, subtle gray borders, and Emerald green exclusively for primary actions and positive trends.
For the AI Reconciliation UI, display 'AI Confidence & Explainability' explicitly. Use the `ai_insight_card` styling for these cards so they stand out positively.
Ensure severity badges (Critical, Warning, Info) use the provided component guidelines for soft pastel backgrounds with stark foreground colors.
Ensure you test all responsive layouts. Mobile screens must restrict image heights to max 80vh.
Use framer-motion for smooth page transitions and list staggering, especially for the invoice reconciliation table to give it a 'live analysis' feel.
